CREATE TABLE test_data (number FLOAT, weight UInt64) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT quantileExactWeightedInterpolated(0.5)(number, weight) AS median_value, AVG(number) FROM test_data;
SELECT MAX(number), quantileExactWeightedInterpolated(0.5)(number, weight) AS median_value FROM test_data;
SELECT SUM(weight) AS total_weight, quantileExactWeightedInterpolated(0.75)(number, weight) FROM test_data GROUP BY total_weight;
CREATE TABLE second_data (number FLOAT, weight UInt64) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT q.median_value, s.number FROM (SELECT quantileExactWeightedInterpolated(0.5)(number, weight) AS median_value FROM test_data) AS q JOIN second_data AS s ON s.number > 15;
SELECT quantileExactWeightedInterpolated(0.5)(nested.number, nested.weight) FROM (SELECT number, weight FROM test_data) AS nested;
SELECT (SELECT quantileExactWeightedInterpolated(0.9)(number, weight) FROM test_data) AS result WHERE result > 5;
SELECT quantileExactWeightedInterpolated(0.5)(number, weight) FROM test_data WHERE number < 5;
SELECT quantileExactWeightedInterpolated(0.7)(number, weight) FROM (SELECT number, weight FROM test_data WHERE weight > 2) AS filtered_data;
